title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 26.530 - Approved plan to have effect of law, published how
text:
26.530.  Approved plan to have effect of law, published how. — A reorganization plan not disapproved by one or the other house of the legislature in the manner set forth in section 26.510 shall be considered for all purposes as the equivalent in force, effect and intent of a public act of the state upon its taking effect by executive order as set forth in section 26.510, and it shall be published together with the laws adopted by the general assembly at the session in which the plan is submitted.
(L. 1967 p. 98 § 4)
